title: feat(helm): Add valueFrom support for environment variables in chart
author: HarK-github

findings.description: `valueFrom` only covers `configMapKeyRef` and `secretKeyRef`. Kubernetes `EnvVarSource` also supports `fieldRef` (Downward API — Pod metadata) and `resourceFieldRef` (container resource limits/requests). Omitting them means valid Kubernetes env-var configs will fail Helm schema validation. Add both `fieldRef` and `resourceFieldRef` as additional `oneOf` alternatives, or remove `additionalProperties: false` from the `valueFrom` object.

Commit title `feat(helm): Add valueFrom support for environment variables in chart` uses Conventional Commits style. Project convention is `helm: deployment: Add valueFrom support for env vars`. This will likely trigger a CHANGES_REQUESTED from the maintainer before merge.
